data.product_title: Apple iPhone Air 512GB SIM-Free: The thinnest iPhone ever, featuring a 6.5-inch ProMotion display with up to 120Hz, powerful A19 Pro chip, center frame front camera, all-day battery; Cloud White
features: Ultra-thin Ultra-light Super tough The thinnest iPhone ever Experience the Pros power effortlessly At just 5.6mm, the iPhone Air is a miracle of thinness and lightness that you might forget you are holding it in your hand

More durable than any iPhone before it - ultra-light titanium frame Ceramic Shield protects the back of your iPhone Air with 4x crack resistance The front features a new Ceramic Shield 2 which is three times more scratch resistant
18MP Center Frame Front Camera - Free framing An even smarter group selfie Dual capture video that can be shot simultaneously from the front and back Full of sill!
TWO ADVANCED FEATURES IN ONE CAMERA - 48MP Fusion camera system with 2x telephoto capabilities You can easily capture the perfect shot from wherever you are
A19 Pro Tip Amazing speed Remarkable efficiency - A19 Pro The most efficient chip ever on iPhone Miraculously thin and light design that delivers Pro performance
You can use it all day and still Generous battery life - up to 27 hours of video playback With MagSafe battery accessories, you can use it for up to 13 hours longer

iOS - A new design featuring Liquid Glass Beauty FUN The familiar ease of use A more dynamic lock screen A messaging app where you can customize the background and create polls You can also use features such as incoming call screening
Designed for Apple Intelligence - Personal, private, and powerful Help you write, express yourself and make tasks easier

An even stronger connection Ultra-fast speed - Wi-Fi 7, 5G network, Bluetooth 6, eSIM You will always be connected with a faster and safer connection eSIM Convenient, safe and seamless - iPhone 17 Air is activated via eSIM With eSIM, be more flexible, convenient, and secure Whats more, it connects seamlessly, making it especially convenient when traveling abroad Privacy - With Face ID, you can securely complete unlocking, signing in, and payments
Disclaimer - These are summaries of the main features of the product For details, please see below
data.delivery_text_msg: Order now and get it around Thursday, July 2
